---
title: "Explore data of Coux et al. 2016"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
execute:
    message: false
    warning: false
---

```{r}
#| output: false
library(renv)
renv::load()
library(targets)
library(here)
tar_config_set(
  store = here::here("_targets")
)
library(dplyr)
library(bipartite)
```

Let's begin by looking at the data.

## Overview of the data

First, we have the interaction networks.

```{r}
data <- tar_read(data_coux)
head(data$interaction)
```

We have plant traits.

```{r}
str(data$plant_trait)
```

We have pollinator traits.

```{r}
str(data$pollinator_trait)
```

As well as, plant abundances, which is only presence (1) absence (0).

```{r}
str(data$plant_abundance)
```

And pollinator abundances.

```{r}
str(data$pollinator_abundance)
```

We have coded a function to compute species level network metrics using the
`bipartite::specieslevel` function.

```{r}
net_metrics <- tar_read(net_metrics)
net_metrics
```
